    Richmond Park News: 1 May 2026
    NEXT WEEK’S LOCAL ELECTIONS The local elections take place next week on Thursday 7 May. As a reminder, you must bring a form of ID to the polling station if you wish to cast a vote. If you are interested in learning more about the candidates in your ward, you can find the list of people standing by clicking here for Richmond residents, and here for Kingston residents.     Apr 24, 2026 ∙ 6 min
    Richmond Park News: 24 April 2026
    MEDIA APPEARANCES I was a guest on both BBC Politics Live and LBC Cross Question on Monday, to talk about the political issues of the day, and the conversation inevitably turned to the latest developments around the Peter Mandelson scandal. The Prime Minister’s defence has been that he took a ‘risk’ which backfired, and he is furious that he was not informed that Mandelson did not pass security vetting. The lack of responsibility that the Prime Minister has taken for his involvement in this...

    Apr 17, 2026 ∙ 4 min
    Richmond Park News: 17 April 2026
    PUBLIC ACCOUNTS COMMITTEE VISIT TO CANADA This week, I have been on a visit to the Canadian Parliament as a senior member of the Public Accounts Committee. This offered an exciting opportunity to see the similarities and differences of our two parliamentary democracies. The purpose of the trip was to gain a better understanding of how the Canadian Parliament is carrying out restoration work on Centre Block, which is the equivalent of the Palace of Westminster. This will help us feed back to...

      As the Liberal Democrat MP for Richmond Park, I am a committed advocate for liberal values of inclusivity, opportunity and equality. I am proud to be the voice of Richmond Park in Westminster, working hard on behalf of all of my constituents.

      Details about our data protection and privacy policies are in Sarah Olney's Privacy Policy. This website is hosted by Wix, published and promoted by Massimo Chiesa on behalf of Sarah Olney, both at 108 South Worple Way, East Sheen SW14 8TN. office@saraholney.com
